notes: All benchmarks run on M4 Pro 48GB unless noted (hardware field per run)
Suite v3_14test is the current/primary suite (March 2026)
Suite v1_12test is the Feb 2026 suite with agent A-tasks + B/C text tasks
Suite v2_7test is the B+C text subset (partial runs only)
Rankings only include models with >= 7 tests in their best run
RAM estimates: Q4=0.6 GB/B, Q5=0.75 GB/B, Q8=1.2 GB/B, F16=2.0 GB/B, IQ3=0.45 GB/B
thinking_mode: true = Qwen3 thinking enabled (default), false = nothink/nojinja variant
